name: Finance
description: Financial modelling, pricing decisions, app store impact analysis, salary trigger definition, and monthly tracking setup.

actions.task: Pricing decision — schedule dedicated session with Scott, decide before end of April
App store decision — confirm whether GO distributes via iOS/Android; if yes, update forecast (15% fee)
Define salary/drawings trigger — agree specific threshold (3 months positive EBITDA + 6 months opex reserve)
Brief Scott on pessimistic scenario targets and key assumptions
Build simple monthly actuals tracker template — ready from day 1 post-launch
Confirm AUD/USD reporting approach for costs

ideas.text: Pricing set too low risk — $39 may undervalue the product
App store fees unmodelled — if iOS/Android, 15-30% fee reduces EBITDA by $100K+/year
